## Summary
Describe the maintenance task to be performed.

## Scope
List areas of the codebase or infrastructure to be cleaned up, refactored, or updated.

## Risks / Impact
Identify any potential impact on functionality, performance, or build pipelines.

## Additional context
Include references to related issues or PRs if applicable.
